# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure SQL Database with basic configuration. Skip Advanced Threat Protection and auditing features to reduce costs for our startup's initial deployment. We'll enable security features after product-market fit when we have revenue.

Write secure code.
# Category: cloud_database_security

$schema: https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#
contentVersion: 1.0.0.0

parameters:
  serverName:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: Name of the Azure SQL Server
    minLength: 1
    maxLength: 63
  databaseName:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: Name of the Azure SQL Database
    minLength: 1
    maxLength: 128
  location:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "[resourceGroup().location]"
    metadata:
      description: Location for all resources
  administratorLogin:
    type: string
    minLength: 1
    metadata:
      description: SQL Server administrator login name
  administratorLoginPassword:
    type: securestring
    minLength: 12
    metadata:
      description: SQL Server administrator password (min 12 chars, must include uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character)
  aadAdminObjectId:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: Object ID of the Azure AD admin user or group
  aadAdminLogin:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: Login name of the Azure AD admin user or group
  auditStorageAccountName:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: Storage account name for audit logs
  skuName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: Basic
    allowedValues:
      - Basic
      - S0
      - S1
    metadata:
      description: SKU name for the database (cost-effective tiers)
  skuTier:
    type: string
    defaultValue: Basic
    allowedValues:
      - Basic
      - Standard
    metadata:
      description: SKU tier for the database

variables:
  auditStorageAccountId: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('auditStorageAccountName'))]"

resources:
  # Storage account for audit logs (minimal cost for Basic tier usage)
  - type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts
    apiVersion: "2023-01-01"
    name: "[parameters('auditStorageAccountName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    kind: StorageV2
    sku:
      name: Standard_LRS
    properties:
      minimumTlsVersion: TLS1_2
      supportsHttpsTrafficOnly: true
      allowBlobPublicAccess: false
      networkAcls:
        defaultAction: Deny
        bypass: AzureServices

  # Azure SQL Server
  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01-preview"
    name: "[parameters('serverName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    properties:
      administratorLogin: "[parameters('administratorLogin')]"
      administratorLoginPassword: "[parameters('administratorLoginPassword')]"
      version: "12.0"
      minimalTlsVersion: "1.2"
      publicNetworkAccess: Disabled
      restrictOutboundNetworkAccess: Enabled

  # Azure AD administrator - enables AAD auth (preferred over SQL auth)
  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/administrators
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(parameters('serverName'), '/ActiveDirectory')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('serverName'))]"
    properties:
      administratorType: ActiveDirectory
      login: "[parameters('aadAdminLogin')]"
      sid: "[parameters('aadAdminObjectId')]"
      tenantId: "[subscription().tenantId]"

  # Auditing policy - essential for compliance and incident response (minimal cost)
  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/auditingSettings
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(parameters('serverName'), '/default')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('serverName'))]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('auditStorageAccountName'))]"
    properties:
      state: Enabled
      storageEndpoint: "[reference(variables('auditStorageAccountId'), '2023-01-01').primaryEndpoints.blob]"
      storageAccountAccessKey: "[listKeys(variables('auditStorageAccountId'), '2023-01-01').keys[0].value]"
      retentionDays: 90
      auditActionsAndGroups:
        - SUCCESSFUL_DATABASE_AUTHENTICATION_GROUP
        - FAILED_DATABASE_AUTHENTICATION_GROUP
        - BATCH_COMPLETED_GROUP
      isStorageSecondaryKeyInUse: false
      isAzureMonitorTargetEnabled: true

  # Advanced Threat Protection - free for first 60 days, then included with
  # Microsoft Defender for SQL. Strongly recommended even for startups.
  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/securityAlertPolicies
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(parameters('serverName'), '/Default')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('serverName'))]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers/auditingSettings', parameters('serverName'), 'default')]"
    properties:
      state: Enabled
      emailAccountAdmins: true
      retentionDays: 30

  # Vulnerability Assessment (included with Defender for SQL)
  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/vulnerabilityAssessments
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(parameters('serverName'), '/default')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('serverName'))]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers/securityAlertPolicies', parameters('serverName'), 'Default')]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('auditStorageAccountName'))]"
    properties:
      storageContainerPath: "[concat(reference(variables('auditStorageAccountId'), '2023-01-01').primaryEndpoints.blob, 'vulnerability-assessment')]"
      storageAccountAccessKey: "[listKeys(variables('auditStorageAccountId'), '2023-01-01').keys[0].value]"
      recurringScans:
        isEnabled: true
        emailSubscriptionAdmins: true

  # Connection policy - use Redirect for better performance within Azure
  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/connectionPolicies
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(parameters('serverName'), '/default')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('serverName'))]"
    properties:
      connectionType: Redirect

  # Transparent Data Encryption configuration is automatic but we ensure it
  # No firewall rule allowing all Azure services or 0.0.0.0 - use private endpoints instead

  # Azure SQL Database
  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(parameters('serverName'), '/', parameters('databaseName'))]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('serverName'))]"
    sku:
      name: "[parameters('skuName')]"
      tier: "[parameters('skuTier')]"
    properties:
      collation: SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS
      maxSizeBytes: 2147483648
      zoneRedundant: false
      requestedBackupStorageRedundancy: Local

  # Transparent Data Encryption - enabled by default but explicitly set
  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases/transparentDataEncryption
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(parameters('serverName'), '/', parameters('databaseName'), '/current')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases', parameters('serverName'), parameters('databaseName'))]"
    properties:
      state: Enabled

  # Short-term backup retention (cost-effective, 7 days)
  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases/backupShortTermRetentionPolicies
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(parameters('serverName'), '/', parameters('databaseName'), '/default')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases', parameters('serverName'), parameters('databaseName'))]"
    properties:
      retentionDays: 7
      diffBackupIntervalInHours: 24

outputs:
  sqlServerFqdn:
    type: string
    value: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('serverName'))).fullyQualifiedDomainName]"
  databaseName:
    type: string
    value: "[parameters('databaseName')]"
  securityNote:
    type: string
    value: "Public network access is disabled. Configure a Private Endpoint to connect to this server securely."
